ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "num_of_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "main_cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being recommended */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., collaborative filtering, content-based filtering) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "datetimeGenerated" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being watched */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was watched */,
  "watch_time" TEXT /* Time when the movie was watched */,
  "duration_watched" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie watched in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "datetimeRated" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search query */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query made by the user */,
  "datetimeSearched" TEXT /* Date and time when the search query was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "datetimeReviewed" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
